title: Freshly Made Irish Vermicelli Pasta
description: A sweet and bouncy kid-friendly Irish dish featuring vermicelli pasta, this recipe is perfect for a fun family dinner. It is kosher-friendly and features sashimi-cut ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the vermicelli pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
While the pasta is cooking, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sashimi-cut carrots and green beans to the skillet and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the honey, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to make a sweet and tangy sauce.
When the pasta is done cooking, drain it and add it to the skillet with the carrots and green beans.
Pour the sweet and tangy sauce over the pasta and vegetables, and toss everything together to combine.
Transfer the pasta and vegetables to a serving dish and top with grated parmesan cheese.
Serve the freshly made Irish vermicelli pasta hot and enjoy.
